summary: A top question or answer banner leads the page, issue cues support the frame, a recommendation triplet anchors the body, and a compact impact strip closes the page.
composition_pattern: question banner, issue cues, solution triplet, impact strip
support_structure: compact impact statement or metric strip at the lower edge
when_to_use: The page must present a clear question-and-answer structure in one page.
The recommendation naturally breaks into three named moves or a short triplet.
avoid_when: The page needs a long context narrative block.
Impact proof should dominate more than the recommendation board.
